## Checklist

- [ ] `go test ./... -race -count=1` passes
- [ ] `gofmt -l .` is empty and `go vet ./...` is clean
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits (no AI/assistant references)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` `[Unreleased]` updated for any user-visible change
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or interfaces changed
